paper_title: DNA Extraction and 16S rRNA Community Analysis of Bioreactor Communities

methods.method_name: DNA Extraction and 16S rRNA Community Analysis
methods.description: This method describes the process of extracting DNA from bioreactor communities and analyzing the 16S rRNA gene sequences to study microbial community composition.

steps.description: DNA extraction on electrode biofilms was conducted as previously described (Lam et al., 2018).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct DNA extraction on electrode biofilms

steps.description: Planktonic cells were collected by centrifuging 50 mL of media from the bioreactors at 10,000 rpm for 10 min at 4°C.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge bioreactor media to collect planktonic cells

steps.description: Resultant cell pellets and electrode biomass were directly added to bead beating tubes from a MO BIO PowerSoil DNA Isolation Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: add cell pellets and biomass to bead beating tubes

steps.description: DNA extraction was performed using the MO BIO PowerSoil DNA Isolation Kit following manufacturer's protocols.
steps.searchable_summary: perform DNA extraction using PowerSoil kit

steps.description: Extracted DNA quality and quantity was assessed using a Nanodrop.
steps.searchable_summary: assess DNA quality and quantity with Nanodrop

steps.description: Illumina MiSeq paired-end sequencing was done on the V4 hypervariable region of the 16S rRNA gene.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Illumina MiSeq sequencing on 16S rRNA gene

steps.description: Ribosomal sequences were amplified with a 30-cycle PCR reaction with a 53°C annealing temp using barcoded 515F primer paired with 806R primer.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify ribosomal sequences with PCR

steps.description: Amplicons were pooled and purified with calibrated Agencourt Ampure XP beads.
steps.searchable_summary: purify amplicons with Ampure XP beads

steps.description: DNA libraries were prepared using the resultant PCR product with the Illumina TruSeq DNA library preparation protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare DNA libraries with TruSeq protocol

steps.description: Sequenced on an Illumina MiSeq following manufacturer's procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence DNA libraries on Illumina MiSeq

steps.description: QIIME bioinformatics pipeline was applied for barcode removal, quality filtering, and chimera checks.
steps.searchable_summary: apply QIIME pipeline for sequence processing

steps.description: De novo OTU picking was utilized for taxonomy assignment based on 97% similarity.
steps.searchable_summary: perform OTU picking for taxonomy assignment

steps.description: Phylogenetic analysis was conducted using the Greengenes database.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct phylogenetic analysis with Greengenes

steps.description: Downstream analyses of 16S rRNA sequencing data such as NMDS were run with the R package, Phyloseq.
steps.searchable_summary: perform NMDS analysis with Phyloseq

steps.description: Evaluation of the contribution of different variables to bioreactor microbial community variation was done using PERMANOVA with the Adonis function.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate community variation with PERMANOVA

methods.description: This method outlines the process for taxonomic classification and phylogenetic analysis of microbial isolates.

steps.description: Stocks were streaked on enriched seawater agar plates or agar plates made with FeCl2 or S0 as electron donor sources.
steps.searchable_summary: streak stocks on agar plates with different electron donors

steps.description: PCR was performed directly on colonies or DNA extracted from pellets of overnight liquid cultures to amplify the 16S rRNA gene with the primers 27F and 1492R.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify 16S rRNA gene with PCR

steps.description: Purified PCR product was sequenced with both primers.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence purified PCR product

steps.description: Sequences were quality checked using BioEdit and aligned against the SILVA database using the SINA aligner.
steps.searchable_summary: quality check and align sequences with SILVA

steps.description: Maximum likelihood phylogenetic trees were built using the RAxML program with the ARB software package interface.
steps.searchable_summary: build phylogenetic trees with RAxML
